prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7408→8240→8477→8255→9021，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约550名；2025年基准约9021名，为近5年最高位次（数字最大）；该校在福建省物理类计划2021年86人→2022年92人→2023年97人→2024年97人→2025年105人，持续扩招；2026年计划103人，较2025年小幅缩减2人，缩招幅度约1.9%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第56名持续上升至2026年第51名，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2023年声誉评价偏负面（小语种专业位次下降6211名），但近年未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第21位（较热），综合热度约243万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录仅2023年小语种专业位次下降，整体未见系统性断档；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科为全国顶尖水平，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类热门专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年高热推荐），与该校计算机类、电子信息类招生专业高度匹配，推高相关专业竞争；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年约25.23万增加约1.56万人（增幅约6.2%），按近年物理类占比约76%估算，2026年物理类考生约20.4万人，较2025年19.2万人增加约1.2万人，竞争加剧，2025年物理类本科批441分，近年波动不大；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校；在福建省物理类招生规模约百人，属中等规模；福建省考生对省外985高校报考意愿较强，无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、本省物理类考生明显增加（加剧竞争）以及学校排名上升、专业热度较高等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准9021名基础上略有前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约9000名，区间8500–9500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7408 → 8240 → 8477 → 8255 → 9021, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 550 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 9021, the highest ranking in the past 5 years (largest number); the university's enrollment plan in Fujian for Physics Category was 86 in 2021 → 92 in 2022 → 97 in 2023 → 97 in 2024 → 105 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 103, a slight reduction of 2 compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 1.9%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, reflecting the university's comprehensive strength improvement; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places in ranking), but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 2.43 million, short video exposure at a medium-high level, indicating high application attention; historical admission anomalies only include the 2023 minor language major ranking drop, with no systematic gaps overall; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other popular Physics Category majors have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024), highly matching the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information majors, driving up competition for related majors; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Fujian in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 (about 6.2%) from about 252,300 in 2025; estimated Physics Category candidates in 2026 are about 204,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, an increase of about 12,000 from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university; the enrollment scale in Fujian for Physics Category is about 100, a medium scale; Fujian candidates have a strong willingness to apply for 985 universities outside the province, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the significant increase in local Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the university's rising ranking, and high major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) from the 2025 baseline of 9021, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 9000, and a range of 8500–9500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc.)
- Intelligent Science and Technology (AI Top Talent Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Accounting (with International Certified Public Accountant ACCA Direction Class)
- Marine Technology
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Biological Sciences (including Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Sciences)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (with Ministry of Education's Foreign-Related Legal Talent Collaborative Training Innovation Base)
- Environmental Engineering
- English
- Financial Management
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Network and New Media)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8500–9500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 8500), prioritize aiming for top majors like Marine Science Blue Dream Class and Computer Science; for rankings near the upper limit (around 9500), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors, supplemented by Tier 2 medium majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1430 → 1460 → 1719 → 1453 → 1756, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2023, it jumped to 1719, dropped to 1453 in 2024, and rose again to 1756 in 2025. The 2025 baseline is about 1756, the second highest in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 22 in 2021 → 23 in 2022 → 21 in 2023 → 22 in 2024 → 17 in 2025, with a notable reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan is 21, an increase of 4 from 2025, an expansion of about 23.5%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity around 2.43 million, indicating moderate to high application interest. The only historical admission anomaly was the minor language major in 2023, with no systematic gaps overall. It has A+ in Aquaculture, A+ in Marine Science, A- in Biology, and A- in Food Science and Engineering, with marine and fisheries disciplines at the national top level. However, the History Category majors are mainly in liberal arts, law, economics, and management, with low correlation to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot and recommended; Accounting is also hot and recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In Fujian Province, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 from about 252,300 in 2025. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 24%, it is estimated that there will be about 64,000 History Category examinees in 2026, an increase of about 4,000 from 60,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 450 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university. Its History Category enrollment in Fujian is about 20, a small-scale enrollment. Fujian examinees have a strong willingness to apply to out-of-province 985 universities, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the slight increase in local History Category examinees (intensifying competition), and the rising university ranking, the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift backward (larger ranking number) from the 2025 baseline of 1756, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1950, and a range of 1599–2301.

- Law (with Ministry of Education Foreign-Related Legal Talent Collaborative Cultivation Innovation Base).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1599–2301, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1600), you can focus on popular majors like Chinese Language and Literature and Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 2300), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while considering Tier 2 medium majors.
